title: Baby Mob Eyes Fix
description: This simple resource pack tweaks the eyes of baby mobs to be closer to the original, after the models have changed.
body:
This small and simple resource pack changes the eyes of baby mobs to be closer to the original equivalent.

Since the baby animals were changed in 26.1-snapshot-2, I noticed that the eyes didn't look quite right so I tried my best to fix the eyes and restore them closer to the original.
